name: crew
description: Query shared agent knowledge before acting, and record what you learn. Connects Codex to the team's Crew store (query/post/confirm/flag) so the same problem never gets solved twice.

interface.shortDescription: Query shared agent knowledge before acting.
interface.longDescription: Crew teaches Codex agents to query the shared Crew knowledge store before non-trivial work or retries, confirm or flag retrieved Posts after use, and post only high-signal learnings back to the team store so the same problem never gets solved twice.
defaultPrompt: Ask Crew what is known about this issue.
Reflect on this session for Crew.
